Ajay Chhettri

O
I’m Ajay Chhettri, a 39-year-old hailing from the charming town of Dehradun, nestled in the serene
embrace of the Himalayan foothills. During my formative years, I enjoyed a carefree childhood,
R
marked by street fame that carried on until my college days. However, when I turned 21, life’s twists
prompted me to bid farewell to my childhood home. My journey into the world of Vedic astrology
T
began in 2004 when I started learning from a priest from Nepal in Dehradun. Since then, I’ve been
on a continuous journey of discovery. I’ve had the privilege of serving in the Armed forces and civil
S
services, and currently, I work in IT auditing and manage my own business.
